O
7、全文叙事集中，不枝不蔓，语言朴实流畅，感情真挚感人。
8、 通篇文章语气轻松幽默，显得妙趣横生，读来令人爱不释手"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728813224,"group_id":"7341340300448648216","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8bgWJuieREL6FlaorPm09T/5gOGXoH+dqUKbRYusVPa","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ede7df7f1b9b4afca4135c02b8debdfa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706136&x-signature=MYDLIaulSyAzBgbYXkWAGYjkjp4%3D","user_id":"3676365828405502","user_name":"我在家里S"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3676365828405502","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1701497873,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7341340300448648216","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到大奉朝英国公之子，还是一个闻名京师的憨人、败家子。
林尘揉着自己的拳头：“既然是国公之子，我还怕谁？”
于是，林尘一路横冲直撞，从京师到江南，从庙宇到朝堂，从塞北到草原，留下赫赫威名。
大奉商人都懵了：“不是，你直接干成大奉首富了，你这叫败家？”
御史：“林尘那个浑人竟然在崇文门要单挑一群大臣，弹劾，必须得弹劾！”
草原公主赞叹：“不愧是草原第一雄鹰，长生天，他是我一定要得到的男人！”
公主哭哭啼啼：“父皇，你得给我做主啊，上次是草原女子，这次是西域妖女。”
皇帝头疼无比，看向林尘，林尘双手一摊：“怪我咯？”
这是一个败家子崛起的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a0a743c4c90ab1b9a8e822e3f6fa962f","author":"漫步风中","author_id":"","book_id":"7341340300448648216","book_name":"我，大奉唯一的爹","book_short_name":"败家帝师","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7342868971449745944","read_count":"96118","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2715790"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1192","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/279b763fe01389ec1fc6ae6d69265766~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779305087&x-signature=MPbX9wU%2BeDssgHNpzeGjRmY%2BsrQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"795686832445591","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"134"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203244702CE5FBEEED060F8611A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9631,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":43246},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7486271861435204377","
